dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard. We're expecting a smooth flight today."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Smooth flight? We're flying a plane, not a rollercoaster!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, a hint of amusement in his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Hey, we can handle it. We're not exactly beginners."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, brow furrowed in concern.

dialogue.speaker: ABEERA
dialogue.line: "I'm sure you're both perfectly capable. But just to put your minds at ease, we have state-of-the-art navigation systems."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a smug grin spreading across his face.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're experiencing some turbulence. Nothing to worry about."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Turbulence? You call this turbulence? We're going to crash!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his eyes darting between the instruments.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Come on, Sam, it's just a little bump. We're fine."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his face pale with fear.

dialogue.speaker: ABEERA
dialogue.line: "Sir, ma'am, please fasten your seatbelts. This may get a bit bumpy."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his voice steady but his eyes betraying a hint of worry.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're going to be okay. Just hold on."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "What's going on? Why is this happening?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, a hint of strain visible in his voice.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes wide with fear.

dialogue.speaker: ABEERA
dialogue.line: "Everyone, please stay calm. We're doing our best to stabilize the plane."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his voice firm but his eyes darting towards the controls.
